description: A perfect addition to your ethnic wardrobe, this sandal from catwalk is crafted from durable material with a fashionable cut to offer exemplary comfort without compromising on style.Heel: 1.5"UpperHeavily embellished synthetic leather straps in a thong style with a toe separatorSynthetic leather lined footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with grooves for absolute gripSandal careWipe surface with a clean and dry clothDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
